allow: PowerShell($env:PORT="3100"; npm run start 2>&1 | Out-File -FilePath "$env:TEMP\\bf_server.log" -Encoding utf8)

PowerShell($ok=$false; for\($i=0;$i -lt 20;$i++\){ try { $r=Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3100/api/orders" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 2; "GET /api/orders -> $\($r.StatusCode\) body=$\($r.Content\)"; $ok=$true; break } catch { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 700 } }; if\(-not $ok\){ "Serveur pas encore prêt"; Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\bf_server.log" -Tail 10 })
